title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Adobe India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Adobe India
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
